topic: The one line every website needs: city + service in the page title
caption:
Google can't guess where you are.
Put your city and service in your page title, not just your business name.
Example: 'HVAC Repair in Hesperia CA' beats 'Welcome to Bob's Heating' every time.
Take 10 minutes this week and fix it.
Link in bio to see how we set this up.

#LocalSEO #HighDesert #Victorville #Hesperia #AppleValley #SmallBusiness #SmallBusinessOwner #WebDesign #WebsiteDesign #VeteranOwned #Barstow #PageTitle
alt_text: Bold text on a clean background showing an example page title reading 'Plumber in Victorville CA' to illustrate a local SEO tip for High Desert small business owners.

copy.headline: One Line That Helps Google Find You
copy.body: Your page title needs your city and your service. Not just your business name. Something like: 'Plumber in Victorville CA' tells Google exactly who you serve.
copy.caption:
Google can't guess where you are.
Put your city and service in your page title, not just your business name.
Example: 'HVAC Repair in Hesperia CA' beats 'Welcome to Bob's Heating' every time.
Take 10 minutes this week and fix it.
Link in bio to see how we set this up.
